creator: chris@acsi.ca
text:
(In reply to John Baldwin from comment #4)

John,

'hw.pci.enable_pcie_hp=0'

This works, thank you very much. I expect your assumption on why is correct, or at least in the right direction.

I will be testing the patch at sometime in the future, there's some problems I have to deal with first, but I wanted to report back in case anyone else was stumped by this one.

Thanks again, this was a major hurdle to moving off 10.2.
